creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-10-15 16:02:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/pear-Net_Nmap    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Net_Nmap is a simple interface for Nmap, the
  free and open source utility for network
  exploration or security auditing.
  
  Net_Nmap can be used to auto discovery hosts
  and services in your network or simply to
  parse Nmap XML output.
  
  WWW: http://pear.php.net/package/Net_Nmap/
  
  PR:             ports/128059
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping<wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2044    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/net/pear-Net_Nmap/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/pear-Net_Nmap/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/net/pear-Net_Nmap/pkg-descr (new)
